Bug / Task Description: The authentication layer issues distinct access tokens and refresh tokens, and several call sites decode a token while requiring a specific token kind (for example, the token-refresh flow must only accept a refresh token, while request authentication must only accept an access token). At the moment a token of the wrong kind is accepted wherever a specific kind is required, so a refresh token can be presented in place of an access token, and vice versa. Make token decoding enforce the requested token type and reject a mismatch, while still decoding successfully when no specific type is requested. Add a hidden behavioural test under tests/unit/ that captures this.
Commit Subject: fix(security): enforce expected token type when decoding JWTs
